message:
feat(netlify,dockerhub,shopify,paypal): build 4 Tier 2 connectors

Netlify connector (connectors/netlify/):
- 13 ops: sites.list/get/create/delete, deploys.list/get/create/rollback,
  dns.list_zones, env.list/set/delete, health
- Bearer token auth, api.netlify.com
- 61 tests, clippy clean

Docker Hub connector (connectors/dockerhub/):
- 9 ops: repos.list/get/create/delete, tags.list/get/delete,
  orgs.list, health
- Access token or JWT login auth, hub.docker.com
- 67 tests, clippy clean

Shopify connector (connectors/shopify/):
- 12 ops: products.list/get/create/update/delete,
  orders.list/get/create, customers.list/get, inventory.list, health
- X-Shopify-Access-Token header, {shop}.myshopify.com
- 62 tests, clippy clean

PayPal connector (connectors/paypal/):
- 10 ops: orders.create/get/capture, payments.list/get/refund,
  invoices.create/list/send, health
- OAuth2 client_credentials, sandbox/production URL support
- 63 tests, clippy clean

All: V3 FcpConnector trait, ConnectorRuntime+RetryLoop, manifest.toml,
doctor/self_check, Dangerous ops require Interactive approval.

Closes beads j05nu.4.1.1/2, j05nu.4.3.1/2, j05nu.6.1.1/2, j05nu.6.2.1/2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,10 @@ members = [
     "connectors/bitbucket",
     "connectors/browser",
     "connectors/cloudflare",
+    "connectors/dockerhub",
+    "connectors/netlify",
+    "connectors/shopify",
+    "connectors/paypal",
     "connectors/gcp",
     "connectors/vercel",
     "connectors/google-ai",

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-dockerhub"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+publish = false
+description = "FCP Docker Hub connector for Repositories, Tags, and Organizations"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-dockerhub"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_dockerhub"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+async-trait.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+chrono.workspace = true
+fcp-crypto.workspace = true
+fcp-testkit.workspace = true
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,192 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.dockerhub"
+name = "Docker Hub"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Docker Hub connector for Repositories, Tags, and Organizations"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+homepage = "https://docs.docker.com/docker-hub/api/latest/"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.repos_list]
+summary = "List repositories"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.repos_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list Docker Hub repositories"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_get]
+summary = "Get repository details"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.repos_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details about a specific Docker Hub repository"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_create]
+summary = "Create a repository"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_create.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.repos_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a new Docker Hub repository"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_delete]
+summary = "Delete a repository"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.write"
+risk = "critical"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.repos_delete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.repos_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to permanently delete a Docker Hub repository"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_list]
+summary = "List tags for a repository"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.tags_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list tags for a Docker Hub repository"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_get]
+summary = "Get tag details"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.tags_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details about a specific tag"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_delete]
+summary = "Delete a tag"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.tags_delete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.tags_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to delete a tag from a repository"
+
+[provides.operations.orgs_list]
+summary = "List organizations"
+capability = "dockerhub.orgs.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.orgs_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.orgs_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list Docker Hub organizations"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify API credentials"
+capability = "dockerhub.repos.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hub.docker.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to verify Docker Hub credentials"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 128
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"

+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Netlify connector for Sites, Deploys, DNS, and Environment Variables"

+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]

+[provides.operations.env_list]
+summary = "List environment variables"
+capability = "netlify.env.read"

+[provides.operations.env_delete]

+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true

+[provides.operations.env_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to remove an environment variable — may break builds"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify API token"
+capability = "netlify.sites.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"

+host_allow = ["api.netlify.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to verify Netlify API credentials"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 128
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.paypal"
+name = "PayPal"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "PayPal connector for Orders, Payments, and Invoices"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+homepage = "https://developer.paypal.com/docs/api/overview/"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.orders_create]
+summary = "Create a PayPal order"
+capability = "paypal.orders.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a new PayPal checkout order"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_get]
+summary = "Get order details"
+capability = "paypal.orders.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to check the status of a PayPal order"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_capture]
+summary = "Capture payment for an order"
+capability = "paypal.orders.write"
+risk = "critical"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_capture.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to capture funds for an approved order"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_list]
+summary = "List payments"
+capability = "paypal.payments.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list recent payment captures"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_get]
+summary = "Get payment details"
+capability = "paypal.payments.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details of a specific payment capture"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_refund]
+summary = "Refund a payment"
+capability = "paypal.payments.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.payments_refund.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to refund a captured payment"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_create]
+summary = "Create an invoice"
+capability = "paypal.invoices.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a draft PayPal invoice"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_list]
+summary = "List invoices"
+capability = "paypal.invoices.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list PayPal invoices"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_send]
+summary = "Send an invoice"
+capability = "paypal.invoices.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.invoices_send.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to send a draft invoice to the recipient"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Check PayPal API health"
+capability = "paypal.orders.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to verify PayPal API credentials"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-shopify"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+publish = false
+description = "FCP Shopify connector for Products, Orders, Customers, and Inventory"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-shopify"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_shopify"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+async-trait.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+chrono.workspace = true
+fcp-crypto.workspace = true
+fcp-testkit.workspace = true
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,150 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.shopify"
+name = "Shopify"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Shopify Admin API connector for Products, Orders, Customers, and Inventory"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+homepage = "https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-rest"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.products_list]
+summary = "List products"
+capability = "shopify.products.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.products_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list products in a Shopify store"
+
+[provides.operations.products_get]
+summary = "Get a product by ID"
+capability = "shopify.products.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.products_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details of a specific product"
+
+[provides.operations.products_create]
+summary = "Create a product"
+capability = "shopify.products.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.products_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to add a new product to Shopify"
+
+[provides.operations.products_update]
+summary = "Update a product"
+capability = "shopify.products.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.products_update.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to modify an existing product"
+
+[provides.operations.products_delete]
+summary = "Delete a product"
+capability = "shopify.products.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.products_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to permanently remove a product"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_list]
+summary = "List orders"
+capability = "shopify.orders.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list recent orders"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_get]
+summary = "Get an order by ID"
+capability = "shopify.orders.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details of a specific order"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_create]
+summary = "Create an order"
+capability = "shopify.orders.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.orders_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a new order programmatically"
+
+[provides.operations.customers_list]
+summary = "List customers"
+capability = "shopify.customers.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.customers_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list store customers"
+
+[provides.operations.customers_get]
+summary = "Get a customer by ID"
+capability = "shopify.customers.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.customers_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details of a specific customer"
+
+[provides.operations.inventory_list]
+summary = "List inventory levels"
+capability = "shopify.inventory.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.inventory_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to check inventory levels"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Check Shopify API health"
+capability = "shopify.products.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to verify Shopify API credentials"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 128
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
